---
title: "H3- BodyConcern_FitnessBrowsing_Association"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)

d_rednote <- read.csv('../data/RedNote_Survey.csv')
```


# Hypothesis 3
Users with high body image concerns are more likely to browse appearance-related content (weight loss/fitness).
